channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Leak Reveals More Than 100 Scrapped Designs, Including Unseen Creatures and Missing Evolutions  IGN
  2. Pokémon Winds & Waves leaks point to an idea Game Freak scrapped 20 years ago  Polygon.com
  3. A Pokémon Diamond And Pearl Documentary Was Just Uncovered  Kotaku
  4. Scrapped Beta Gen 4 Pokemon Appear Online, Includes Yellow Shellos and Original Starters  OpenCritic
  5. Official Pokémon Diamond & Pearl documentary shows how Game Freak used LEGO during development  GoNintendo

item.title: AMD preparing 8-core Ryzen 7 9800HX3D gaming laptop CPU for CES 2027 reveal - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. AMD preparing 8-core Ryzen 7 9800HX3D gaming laptop CPU for CES 2027 reveal  VideoCardz.com
  2. AMD working on new X3D V-cache mobile chip for gaming laptops, leaker claims — Ryzen 7 9800HX3D could launch with 8 cores, 16 threads, and 96MB cache  Tom's Hardware
  3. AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition Review  TechSpot
  4. AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D Review: 3D V-Cache Gaming Performance For Less  HotHardware
  5. Newegg Slashes AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D To An Effective $270 By Throwing In A Free 240mm Liquid Cooler  Wccftech

item.title: Audiophiles Just Got a New Excuse to Return to Their Old CD Collections - Gear Patrol
item.description: Audiophiles Just Got a New Excuse to Return to Their Old CD Collections  Gear Patrol
